docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 611, AMENDED MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, CALENDAR OF MAY-26-1998, GRANTED NOTICE WAIVED. IF NO STAY FROM SUPERIOR COURT ON 6/3/98, CAS E WILL GO FORWARD. TRIAL CONTINUED TO JUN-03-1998 AT 09:00 AM

JURY TRIAL CONTINUED TO JUL-13-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 PER DEPARTMENT AT TRIAL

ROOM 220 JUDGE KEVIN RYAN, SSAWYER, CSR, GGOROSIN, CLERK C/C FOR TRIAL BY JURY, ALL PARTIES PRESENT. THE COURT TOLD BOTH PARTIES THAT HE WILL SEND CASE TO COMMISSIONER KAPLAN IF BOTH WOULD STIPULATE; DEFTS AGREED, PLTF. DID NOT. ALSO THEY DID NOT WANT TO BE SENT TO JUDGE RYAN BECAUSE PER JUDGE RYAN HE WILL BE AT THE HALL TOMORROW, AND IF HE SENDS THE CASE TO HIM THE TRIAL MIGHT BE CONTINUED TO MONDAY. ALSO PARTIES PREFERRED THAT THE WRIT BE HEARD FIRST BEFORE THE TRIAL, HENCE TRIAL CONT'D TO 7/13/98, NOTICES WAIVED.
